chapter_title.ar: باب شَرْطِ مَنْ أُذِنَ لَهُ فِي أَعْمَالِهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – The stipulations for the one who is allowed to be in their (government) workforce

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/67)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/67)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا تَقُولُ فِي أَعْمَالِ هَؤُلَاءِ قَالَ إِنْ كُنْتَ لَا بُدَّ فَاعِلًا فَاتَّقِ أَمْوَالَ الشِّيعَةِ
قَالَ فَأَخْبَرَنِي عَلِيٌّ أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَجْبِيهَا مِنَ الشِّيعَةِ عَلَانِيَةً وَ يَرُدُّهَا عَلَيْهِمْ فِي السِّرِّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from the one who mentioned it, from Ali Bin Asbat, from Ibrahim Bin Abu Mahmoud, from Ali Bin Yaqteen who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What are you<sup>asws</sup> saying regarding being of their (governmental) workforce?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If it was inevitable, so do it, but fear the wealth of the Shiah (for the government)’.
He (the narrator) said, ‘So Ali (Bin Al-Yaqteen) informed me that he would collect from the Shiah in the open, and was returning to them in the secrecy’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from those whom he has mentioned from Ali ibn Asbat from Ibrahim ibn abu Mahmud from Ali ibn Yaqtin who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘How is working for these people ? 5 He (the Imam) said, ‘If you do not have any choice, you must observe caution about properties of al-Shi 5 ah . 5 He (the narrator) has said that Ali told me, ‘He would collect funds from al-Shi 5 ah in public, then return it to them secretly . 555
